message:
docs: Add transcript deletion to changelog

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/tb7y4bomscks7nopj62uh9to

files.patch:

 description: "Product updates and announcements"

+<Update label="January 31, 2025">
+## Transcript Deletion
+
+Transcript owners and team admins can now delete transcripts directly from the dashboard.
+</Update>
+
